steps.t: Cerdic has asked that you speak to his men to learn more of the Balewood before venturing into the forest.
The bunker can be found in Cerdic's camp overlooking the roadway to the east. You have spoken to Cerdic's men. You should now take up a post at the ne…
The Orc raiding party has passed along the road. You should speak to Cerdic before venturing into the Balewood.
